narrative:
Jackson Township has 3,074 registered voters, with 60.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.5%, a clear Republican lean of 6.3 percentage points.
